_doc: P38 'The Sunken Tome of Vael'Zhur' adventure — area markers + custom NPCs. Kept OUT of data/npcs/ so these NPCs seed ONLY through the adventure (engine/adventure_tome.py), not the general world roster. Areas are Location markers planted near their terrain; 'The Drowned Vault' triggers the data/structures.json 'drowned_vault' structure to attach (an enterable dungeon).

areas.name: Mirefen
areas.legend: A huddle of stilt-houses at the marsh's edge, where the fisherfolk whisper of a light beneath the water.

areas.name: Thornwatch Ruins
areas.legend: A drowned monastery, its cloisters gone to reed and grave-cold silence.

areas.name: The Ashen Camp
areas.legend: Cook-fires that never gutter — the Cinder Circle, camped and waiting for the wards to fail.

areas.name: Ysolde's Hollow
areas.legend: A witch's hut on a hummock of black willow, hung with tide-charms.

areas.name: The Drowned Vault
areas.legend: Where Vael'Zhur sank his tower-library to cheat death. The drowning-wards are failing.

sage_ondrel.name: Sage Ondrel
sage_ondrel.description: A stooped scholar of Mirefen, ink-stained and sharp-eyed, who has spent forty years reading the marsh's drowned history.
goals: See the Sunken Tome safely sealed

warden_halric.name: Warden Halric
warden_halric.description: A grim Lantern Warden in salt-stained mail, sworn to seal what should stay drowned. His order wants the Tome bound, never read.
goals: Bind Vael'Zhur back into his drowning-sleep

witch_ysolde.name: Ysolde the Marsh-Witch
witch_ysolde.description: The marsh-witch of the black willow hollow, neither friend nor foe — a keeper of old bargains who holds the last warding-fragment, for a price.
goals: Trade the last fragment for a favor
